label: IDS/IPS Research
title: IDS/IPS Research with Snort
excerpt: Research and implementation of Intrusion Detection and Prevention Systems using Snort on Linux. Includes rule writing, traffic analysis, and lab reports.

label: Network Security
title: Network Security & Traffic Analysis
excerpt: Deep dive into network security concepts including packet inspection, firewall configuration, VPN setup, and network monitoring.

label: Blue Team Labs
title: Blue Team Defense Labs
excerpt: Hands-on blue team exercises covering incident response, log analysis, threat hunting, and security hardening of Linux systems.

label: Security Tools
title: Security Tools & Scripts
excerpt: Custom security tools and automation scripts built with Python and Bash for network scanning, log parsing, and threat detection.
